tasks.title: Pick item from top shelf and place into cart
tasks.description: Stand upright, reach the top shelf with both arms, grasp one item, walk to the cart, and place the item inside without dropping.

tasks.title: Pick item from middle shelf bent and place into cart
tasks.description: Bend the torso forward, reach the middle shelf, grasp one item, recover upright, walk to the cart, and place the item inside.

tasks.title: Pick item from bottom shelf crouch and place into cart
tasks.description: Crouch down, reach the bottom shelf, grasp one item, return to standing, walk to the cart, and place the item inside.
